text:
was the father of Kuklo, husband of Elena, and a squad leader of the Survey Corps.

Story

The Titan's Son arc

During an expedition outside the Walls, Heath is killed by a Titan known as "Ogre"; his decapitated head is later thrown over the Wall by a Titan. His wife, Elena, is traumatized after finding his head shortly after.

Relationships

Elena - It would seem, based on her reaction after his death, that she loved him dearly. So much so that her grief causes her to join the Titan worshippers.
Kuklo - His, at the time, unborn son. They never got a chance to meet each other because he was killed by a Titan before his son was born.
Jorge Pikale - Heath presumably respected Jorge due to being his commander. Likewise, Jorge recognized Heath's abilities and saw a great career in the Survey Corps for him. He was greatly saddened by Heath's death.
